title: geum reptans
intro: Geum reptans, also known as creeping avens, is a low-growing perennial plant that belongs to the rose family and is native to Europe and western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Geum reptans include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers, as well as reducing fever and relieving respiratory problems. Geum reptans can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion to utilize its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
